[Tool result] Write

assistant:
现在改造小程序AI结果页，调用真实后端API。
[Tool call] Write
  path: /Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、自营项目/MBTI/miniprogram/pages/ai-test/result.js
  contents: // pages/ai-test/result.js - AI分析结果页（对接真实API）
const app = getApp()

Page({
  data: {
    isAnalyzing: true,
    progress: 0,
    analyzingTip: '正在识别面部特征...',
    result: null
  },

  onLoad() {
    this.startAnalysis()
  },

  // 调用后端AI分析API
  startAnalysis() {
    const photos = wx.getStorageSync('aiPhotos') || []
    const tips = ['正在识别面部特征...', '分析眉眼特征...', '结合《冰鉴》分析骨形...', '匹配MBTI/PDP/DISC...', '生成综合报告...']
    let progress = 0
    let tipIndex = 0

    // 进度动画
    const timer = setInterval(() => {
      progress += 3
      if (progress > 95) progress = 95 // 等API返回再到100
      if (progress > (tipIndex + 1) * 18 && tipIndex < tips.length - 1) tipIndex++
      this.setData({ progress: Math.floor(progress), analyzingTip: tips[tipIndex] })
    }, 200)

    // 调用后端API进行真实AI分析
    wx.request({
      url: `${app.globalData.apiBase}/api/analyze`,
      method: 'POST',
      header: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        'Authorization': `Bearer ${wx.getStorageSync('token') || ''}`
      },
      data: {
        photoUrls: photos,
        userId: app.globalData.openId || ''
      },
      success: (res) => {
        clearInterval(timer)
        
        if (res.statusCode === 200 && res.data) {
          const apiData = res.data.data || res.data
          this.setData({ progress: 100, analyzingTip: '分析完成！' })
          
          setTimeout(() => {
            this.processResult(apiData)
          }, 500)
        } else {
          console.error('API返回错误:', res)
          this.setData({ progress: 100 })
          setTimeout(() => this.showFallbackResult(), 500)
        }
      },
      fail: (err) => {
        clearInterval(timer)
        console.error('API调用失败:', err)
        this.setData({ progress: 100 })
        setTimeout(() => this.showFallbackResult(), 500)
      }
    })
  },

  // 处理API返回的真实结果
  processResult(apiData) {
    const result = {
      mbti: apiData.mbti?.type || 'INTJ',
      mbtiTitle: apiData.mbti?.title || '战略家',
      disc: apiData.disc?.primary || 'D',
      discDesc: apiData.disc?.description || '',
      pdp: apiData.pdp?.primary || '老虎',
      pdpSecondary: apiData.pdp?.secondary || '猫头鹰',
      pdpDesc: apiData.pdp?.description || '',
      pdpEmoji: this.getPDPEmoji(apiData.pdp?.primary),
      title: `${apiData.mbti?.type || 'INTJ'} · ${apiData.pdp?.primary || '老虎'}型`,
      summary: apiData.overview || '分析完成',
      traits: apiData.facialExpressions?.emotions || ['专注', '自信', '沉稳'],
      faceAnalysis: this.formatFaceAnalysis(apiData.faceAnalysis),
      careers: ['战略咨询', '项目管理', '数据分析', '系统架构', '研究员'],
      relationship: '在人际关系中注重深度交流，建议适当表达情感。',
      gallupTop3: apiData.gallup?.top3 || ['战略', '统率', '成就'],
      // 维度数据
      dimensions: apiData.mbti?.dimensions || {},
      discSecondary: apiData.disc?.secondary || ''
    }

    // 保存结果
    wx.setStorageSync('aiResult', result)
    app.saveTestResult('ai', result)

    this.setData({ isAnalyzing: false, result })
  },

  // 格式化面相分析文本
  formatFaceAnalysis(fa) {
    if (!fa) return '面部特征显示出较强的意志力和决断力。'
    const parts = []
    if (fa.forehead) parts.push('额头：' + fa.forehead)
    if (fa.eyes) parts.push('眼睛：' + fa.eyes)
    if (fa.nose) parts.push('鼻子：' + fa.nose)
    if (fa.mouth) parts.push('嘴巴：' + fa.mouth)
    if (fa.chin) parts.push('下巴：' + fa.chin)
    if (fa.boneStructure) parts.push('骨形：' + fa.boneStructure)
    return parts.join('\n') || '面部特征显示出较强的意志力和决断力。'
  },

  // PDP类型对应emoji
  getPDPEmoji(type) {
    const map = { '老虎': '🐅', '孔雀': '🦚', '无尾熊': '🐨', '猫头鹰': '🦉', '变色龙': '🦎' }
    return map[type] || '🐅'
  },

  // 降级：使用本地模拟结果
  showFallbackResult() {
    const result = {
      mbti: 'INTJ', mbtiTitle: '战略家',
      disc: 'D', discDesc: '力量型为主',
      pdp: '老虎', pdpSecondary: '猫头鹰', pdpEmoji: '🐅',
      title: 'INTJ · 老虎型',
      summary: '基于AI面相分析，您展现出较强的逻辑分析能力和独立思考能力。',
      traits: ['逻辑思维强', '独立自主', '追求完美'],
      faceAnalysis: '您的面部特征显示出较强的意志力和决断力。',
      careers: ['战略咨询', '项目管理', '数据分析'],
      relationship: '在人际关系中注重深度交流。',
      gallupTop3: ['战略', '统率', '成就']
    }
    wx.setStorageSync('aiResult', result)
    this.setData({ isAnalyzing: false, result })
  },

  shareResult() {},
  retake() { wx.navigateTo({ url: '/pages/ai-test/camera' }) },
  goHome() { wx.navigateTo({ url: '/pages/index/index' }) },

  onShareAppMessage() {
    const r = this.data.result
    return {
      title: `AI分析我是${r?.mbti} ${r?.pdpEmoji}${r?.pdp}型，来测测你的！`,
      path: '/pages/ai-test/index'
    }
  }
})

assistant:
## ✅ v1.4.0 完成

### AI服务架构

```
用户拍照 → 小程序上传 → /api/analyze
                            ↓
                   Gemini API (图片分析) ← 优先
                            ↓ 失败
                   Groq API (文本分析)   ← 降级
                            ↓ 失败
                   模拟数据              ← 兜底
```

### AI分析提示词

基于 **曾国藩《冰鉴》+ 《周易》+ 面相五官**，分析输出：
- **MBTI** 16种类型
- **PDP** 主性格+辅助性格（老虎/孔雀/无尾熊/猫头鹰/变色龙）
- **DISC** 力量D/活跃I/和平S/完美C
- **盖洛普** 前三大优势
- **面相** 额头/眼睛/鼻子/嘴巴/下巴/骨形（颧骨、伏犀骨等）

### 小程序AI测试流程

1. 拍照3张（正面/左侧/右侧）
2. 调用 `/api/analyze` 真实API
3. 显示AI分析进度动画
4. 展示完整分析报告（MBTI+PDP+DISC+面相）

### Gemini API

已配置到 `.env.local`，支持真实图片识别分析。

[Tool result] Write

assistant:
现在更新购买页的 JS 逻辑以匹配新的 tab 切换结构。
[Tool call] Write
  path: /Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、自营项目/MBTI/miniprogram/pages/purchase/index.js
  contents: // pages/purchase/index.js
const payment = require('../../utils/payment')

Page({
  data: {
    activeTab: 'personal', // 'personal' | 'enterprise'
    purchasing: false
  },

  onLoad(options) {
    if (options && options.tab) {
      this.setData({ activeTab: options.tab })
    }
  },

  // Tab切换
  switchTab(e) {
    const tab = e.currentTarget.dataset.tab
    this.setData({ activeTab: tab })
  },

  // 处理购买/咨询
  handlePurchase(e) {
    const plan = e.currentTarget.dataset.plan
    
    if (plan === 'personal') {
      // 个人版 → 直接微信支付
      this.purchasePersonal()
    } else {
      // 企业版 → 申请咨询
      this.applyEnterprise(plan)
    }
  },

  // 个人版购买
  purchasePersonal() {
    if (this.data.purchasing) return
    this.setData({ purchasing: true })

    payment.purchaseVIP('personal_insight', 
      () => {
        this.setData({ purchasing: false })
        wx.showToast({
          title: '购买成功',
          icon: 'success'
        })
        setTimeout(() => {
          wx.navigateBack()
        }, 1500)
      },
      () => {
        this.setData({ purchasing: false })
      }
    )
  },

  // 企业版申请咨询
  applyEnterprise(plan) {
    const planNames = {
      startup: '团队启动版（¥19,800）',
      growth: '团队成长版（¥39,800）',
      transform: '团队蜕变版（¥98,000）'
    }

    wx.showModal({
      title: '申请企业咨询',
      content: `您选择了${planNames[plan]}，请添加客服微信 28533368 进行咨询。`,
      confirmText: '复制微信号',
      cancelText: '取消',
      success: (res) => {
        if (res.confirm) {
          wx.setClipboardData({
            data: '28533368',
            success: () => {
              wx.showToast({
                title: '已复制微信号',
                icon: 'success'
              })
            }
          })
        }
      }
    })
  },

  onShareAppMessage() {
    return {
      title: '神仙团队AI性格测试 - 发现你的内在潜能',
      path: '/pages/purchase/index'
    }
  }
})

          <view class="interpersonal-item">
            <text class="interpersonal-label">提升建议：</text>
            <text class="interpersonal-text">{{result.faceAnalysis.interpersonalRelations.improvement}}</text>
          </view>
        </view>
      </view>

      <!-- 盘活潜能 -->

        <text class="card-title">盘活潜能</text>
        <view class="potential-list">
          <view class="potential-item" wx:for="{{result.faceAnalysis.potentials}}" wx:key="name">
            <text class="potential-name">• {{item.name}}</text>
            <text class="potential-desc">{{item.howToUse}}</text>
          </view>
        </view>
      </view>
    </block>

    <!-- ========== 骨相分析模块 ========== -->
    <block wx:if="{{!hasError && activeTab === 'bone' && result.boneAnalysis}}">
      <!-- 骨形总评 -->
      <view class="card">
        <text class="card-title">骨形总评</text>
        <view class="bone-content">
          <view class="bone-item">

            <text class="bone-text">{{result.boneAnalysis.boneFormSummary.elementType}}</text>
          </view>
          <view class="bone-item">

            <text class="bone-text">{{result.boneAnalysis.boneFormSummary.boneFleshRelation}}</text>
          </view>

      <!-- 颧骨与驿马骨 -->
      <view class="card">
        <text class="card-title">颧骨与驿马骨</text>
        <view class="bone-content">

          </view>
        </view>
      </view>

      <!-- 将军骨与肩背骨势 -->

        <view class="bone-content">

            <text class="bone-text">{{result.boneAnalysis.generalBone.suitableRole}}</text>
          </view>
        </view>
      </view>

            <text class="bone-text">{{result.boneAnalysis.sunMoonDragonBone.dragonPalaceBone}}</text>

      <view class="card">

        <view class="life-stage-list">
          <view class="life-stage-item">

        </view>
      </view>

assistant:
现在更新 AI 结果页的 JS 逻辑，支持面相/骨相 tab 切换和新的数据结构。
[Tool call] Read
  path: /Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、自营项目/MBTI/miniprogram/pages/ai-test/result.js

[Tool result] Read

assistant:
[Tool call] Write
  path: /Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、自营项目/MBTI/miniprogram/pages/ai-test/result.js
  contents: // pages/ai-test/result.js - AI分析结果页（按旧版模板重构）
const app = getApp()

Page({
  data: {
    isAnalyzing: true,
    showResult: false,
    hasError: false,
    errorMessage: '',
    progress: 0,
    analyzingTip: '正在识别面部特征...',
    activeTab: 'face', // 'face' | 'bone'
    result: {
      mbti: '',
      title: '',
      summary: '',
      pdp: '',
      pdpAux: '',
      pdpEmoji: '',
      disc: '',
      discAux: '',
      traits: [],
      faceAnalysisText: '',
      careers: [],
      relationship: '',
      gallupTop3: [],
      // 完整面相分析（旧模板结构）
      faceAnalysis: null,
      // 完整骨相分析（旧模板结构）
      boneAnalysis: null
    }
  },

  onLoad() {
    this.startAnalysis()
  },

  // 面相/骨相 Tab 切换
  switchAnalysisTab(e) {
    this.setData({ activeTab: e.currentTarget.dataset.tab })
  },

  // 调用后端AI分析API
  startAnalysis() {
    const photos = wx.getStorageSync('aiPhotos') || []
    const tips = [
      '正在识别面部特征...',
      '分析眉眼特征...',
      '结合《冰鉴》分析骨形...',
      '匹配MBTI/PDP/DISC...',
      '生成综合报告...'
    ]
    let progress = 0
    let tipIndex = 0

    // 进度动画
    const timer = setInterval(() => {
      progress += 3
      if (progress > 95) progress = 95
      if (progress > (tipIndex + 1) * 18 && tipIndex < tips.length - 1) tipIndex++
      this.setData({ progress: Math.floor(progress), analyzingTip: tips[tipIndex] })
    }, 200)

    // 调用后端API
    wx.request({
      url: `${app.globalData.apiBase}/api/analyze`,
      method: 'POST',
      header: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        'Authorization': `Bearer ${wx.getStorageSync('token') || ''}`
      },
      data: {
        photoUrls: photos,
        userId: app.globalData.openId || ''
      },
      success: (res) => {
        clearInterval(timer)
        
        if (res.statusCode === 200 && res.data) {
          const apiData = res.data.data || res.data
          this.setData({ progress: 100, analyzingTip: '分析完成！' })
          
          setTimeout(() => {
            this.processResult(apiData)
          }, 500)
        } else {
          console.error('API返回错误:', res)
          this.setData({ progress: 100 })
          setTimeout(() => this.showFallbackResult(), 500)
        }
      },
      fail: (err) => {
        clearInterval(timer)
        console.error('API调用失败:', err)
        this.setData({ progress: 100 })
        setTimeout(() => this.showFallbackResult(), 500)
      }
    })
  },

  // 处理API返回结果 → 映射到旧模板数据结构
  processResult(apiData) {
    // 尝试检测是否为旧模板完整结构（有 personalityType 字段）
    if (apiData.personalityType) {
      this.processOldTemplateResult(apiData)
      return
    }

    // 新结构适配
    const result = {
      mbti: apiData.mbti?.type || apiData.personalityType?.code || 'INTJ',
      title: apiData.mbti?.title || apiData.personalityType?.name || '战略家',
      summary: apiData.overview || apiData.personalitySummary || '分析完成',
      pdp: apiData.pdp?.primary || apiData.pdp?.main || '老虎',
      pdpAux: apiData.pdp?.secondary || apiData.pdp?.auxiliary || '',
      pdpEmoji: this.getPDPEmoji(apiData.pdp?.primary || apiData.pdp?.main),
      disc: apiData.disc?.primary || apiData.disc?.main || 'D',
      discAux: apiData.disc?.secondary || apiData.disc?.auxiliary || '',
      traits: apiData.facialExpressions?.emotions || apiData.advantages || ['专注', '自信', '沉稳'],
      faceAnalysisText: this.formatFaceAnalysisText(apiData.faceAnalysis),
      careers: apiData.careers || ['战略咨询', '项目管理', '数据分析'],
      relationship: apiData.relationship || '在人际关系中注重深度交流。',
      gallupTop3: apiData.gallup?.top3 || ['战略', '统率', '成就'],
      // 完整结构
      faceAnalysis: apiData.faceAnalysis || null,
      boneAnalysis: apiData.boneAnalysis || null
    }

    wx.setStorageSync('aiResult', result)
    app.saveTestResult && app.saveTestResult('ai', result)

    this.setData({
      isAnalyzing: false,
      showResult: true,
      hasError: false,
      result
    })
  },

  // 处理旧模板结构的完整数据
  processOldTemplateResult(data) {
    const result = {
      mbti: data.personalityType?.code || 'INTJ',
      title: data.personalityType?.name || '战略家',
      summary: data.personalitySummary || '',
      pdp: data.pdp?.main || '老虎',
      pdpAux: data.pdp?.auxiliary || '',
      pdpEmoji: this.getPDPEmoji(data.pdp?.main),
      disc: data.disc?.main || 'D',
      discAux: data.disc?.auxiliary || '',
      traits: data.advantages || [],
      faceAnalysisText: '',
      careers: [],
      relationship: '',
      gallupTop3: [],
      faceAnalysis: data.faceAnalysis || null,
      boneAnalysis: data.boneAnalysis || null
    }

    wx.setStorageSync('aiResult', result)
    app.saveTestResult && app.saveTestResult('ai', result)

    this.setData({
      isAnalyzing: false,
      showResult: true,
      hasError: false,
      result
    })
  },

  // 格式化面相分析为文本（简化版降级使用）
  formatFaceAnalysisText(fa) {
    if (!fa) return ''
    if (typeof fa === 'string') return fa
    
    // 如果有facialFeatures数组，不需要文本版
    if (fa.facialFeatures) return ''
    
    const parts = []
    if (fa.forehead) parts.push('额头：' + fa.forehead)
    if (fa.eyes) parts.push('眼睛：' + fa.eyes)
    if (fa.nose) parts.push('鼻子：' + fa.nose)
    if (fa.mouth) parts.push('嘴巴：' + fa.mouth)
    if (fa.chin) parts.push('下巴：' + fa.chin)
    if (fa.boneStructure) parts.push('骨形：' + fa.boneStructure)
    return parts.join('\n') || ''
  },

  // PDP类型对应emoji
  getPDPEmoji(type) {
    const map = {
      '老虎': '🐅', '孔雀': '🦚', '无尾熊': '🐨', '考拉': '🐨',
      '猫头鹰': '🦉', '变色龙': '🦎'
    }
    return map[type] || '🐅'
  },

  // 降级：使用本地模拟结果
  showFallbackResult() {
    const result = {
      mbti: 'INTJ',
      title: '战略家',
      summary: '基于AI面相分析，您展现出较强的逻辑分析能力和独立思考能力。理性思维主导，善于长期规划和系统性思考。',
      pdp: '老虎',
      pdpAux: '猫头鹰',
      pdpEmoji: '🐅',
      disc: 'D',
      discAux: 'C',
      traits: ['逻辑思维强', '独立自主', '追求完美', '战略眼光'],
      faceAnalysisText: '您的面部特征显示出较强的意志力和决断力。额头饱满，显示智力水平高；眼神坚定有神采，思维方式偏理性。',
      careers: ['战略咨询', '项目管理', '数据分析', '系统架构'],
      relationship: '在人际关系中注重深度交流，建议适当表达情感。',
      gallupTop3: ['战略', '统率', '成就'],
      faceAnalysis: null,
      boneAnalysis: null
    }
    
    wx.setStorageSync('aiResult', result)

    this.setData({
      isAnalyzing: false,
      showResult: true,
      hasError: false,
      result
    })
  },

  // 跳转到MBTI测试
  goToMBTI() {
    wx.navigateTo({ url: '/pages/test/mbti' })
  },

  shareResult() {
    // 触发onShareAppMessage
  },

  retake() {
    wx.navigateTo({ url: '/pages/ai-test/camera' })
  },

  goHome() {
    wx.switchTab({ url: '/pages/index/index' })
  },

  onShareAppMessage() {
    const r = this.data.result
    return {
      title: `AI分析我是${r?.mbti} ${r?.pdpEmoji}${r?.pdp}型，来测测你的！`,
      path: '/pages/ai-test/index'
    }
  }
})

<view class="container">

[Tool result] Write

assistant:
[Tool call] Write
  path: /Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、自营项目/MBTI/miniprogram/pages/history/index.js
  contents: // pages/history/index.js - 测试历史记录（按旧版模板重构）
Page({
  data: {
    activeTab: 'all',
    tabName: '',
    allResults: [],
    filteredResults: []
  },

  onLoad() {
    this.loadHistory()
  },

  onShow() {
    this.loadHistory()
  },

  loadHistory() {
    const mbtiResult = wx.getStorageSync('mbtiResult')
    const discResult = wx.getStorageSync('discResult')
    const pdpResult = wx.getStorageSync('pdpResult')
    const aiResult = wx.getStorageSync('aiResult')

    const allResults = []

    if (mbtiResult) {
      allResults.push({
        type: 'mbti',
        key: 'mbti',
        emoji: '🧠',
        typeName: 'MBTI性格测试',
        resultText: mbtiResult.mbtiType || mbtiResult.mbti || '未知',
        testTime: this.formatTime(mbtiResult.timestamp),
        data: mbtiResult
      })
    }

    if (pdpResult) {
      const primary = pdpResult.description?.type || pdpResult.pdp || '未知'
      allResults.push({
        type: 'pdp',
        key: 'pdp',
        emoji: pdpResult.description?.emoji || '🦁',
        typeName: 'PDP行为偏好测试',
        resultText: primary,
        testTime: this.formatTime(pdpResult.timestamp),
        data: pdpResult
      })
    }

    if (discResult) {
      allResults.push({
        type: 'disc',
        key: 'disc',
        emoji: '📊',
        typeName: 'DISC性格测试',
        resultText: (discResult.dominantType || discResult.disc || '未知') + '型',
        testTime: this.formatTime(discResult.timestamp),
        data: discResult
      })
    }

    if (aiResult) {
      allResults.push({
        type: 'ai',
        key: 'ai',
        emoji: '👁️',
        typeName: '面相分析',
        resultText: aiResult.mbti || '未知',
        testTime: this.formatTime(aiResult.timestamp),
        data: aiResult
      })
    }

    this.setData({ allResults })
    this.filterResults()
  },

  changeTab(e) {
    const tab = e.currentTarget.dataset.tab
    const names = { all: '', mbti: 'MBTI', pdp: 'PDP', disc: 'DISC', ai: '面相' }
    this.setData({ activeTab: tab, tabName: names[tab] || '' })
    this.filterResults()
  },

  filterResults() {
    const { activeTab, allResults } = this.data
    if (activeTab === 'all') {
      this.setData({ filteredResults: allResults })
    } else {
      this.setData({
        filteredResults: allResults.filter(item => item.type === activeTab)
      })
    }
  },

  formatTime(timestamp) {
    if (!timestamp) return '未知时间'
    const date = new Date(timestamp)
    const y = date.getFullYear()
    const m = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0')
    const d = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0')
    const h = String(date.getHours()).padStart(2, '0')
    const min = String(date.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0')
    return `${y}-${m}-${d} ${h}:${min}`
  },

  viewDetail(e) {
    const type = e.currentTarget.dataset.type
    const routes = {
      mbti: '/pages/result/mbti',
      disc: '/pages/result/disc',
      pdp: '/pages/result/pdp',
      ai: '/pages/ai-test/result'
    }
    if (routes[type]) {
      wx.navigateTo({ url: routes[type] })
    }
  },

  goToTest() {
    wx.switchTab({ url: '/pages/index/index' })
  }
})
